message:
fix(test): isolate regression tests from production Dolt server

- Skip regression tests in TestMain when dolt binary not in PATH
- Skip config tests when Dolt server not available (setupTestDB)
- Update doctor tests: no more JSONL fresh-clone concept post-removal
- Update ValidateSyncConfig test: empty config now requires federation.remote
- Windows smoke test: remove bd init (requires Dolt), keep version+help

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -155,18 +155,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Smoke test - version
         run: ./bd.exe version
 
-      - name: Smoke test - init and CRUD
-        run: |
-          $tmpDir = New-TemporaryFile | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item $_; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $_ }
-          Push-Location $tmpDir
-          try {
-            & "$env:GITHUB_WORKSPACE/bd.exe" init --quiet --prefix smoke
-            echo "bd init succeeded (JSONL-only mode on Windows)"
-            echo "Note: Database operations require CGO (not available), skipping CRUD tests"
-          } finally {
-            Pop-Location
-            Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmpDir
-          }
+      - name: Smoke test - help
+        run: ./bd.exe help
 
   fmt-check:
     name: Check formatting
